title: Imperial Basic
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Imperial Basic''' was the official language of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Imperial Remnant]].

{{Imp-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In the novel ''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'', [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] notes that Imperial Basic is highly accented when compared to the [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]] spoken by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] soldiers.

==Appearances==
*[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']]
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]''

{{Interlang
|es=Básico Imperial
}}
